description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, rectangular layout. The structure features extensive use of glass for walls and windows, providing a transparent and airy feel, and is complemented by white and gray solid wall sections. There are multiple outdoor spaces, including a large green lawn, wooden deck areas, and a covered patio, as well as a swimming pool on one side. The main entrance is accentuated by a wooden deck and landscaped greenery, while the rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard. The interior is divided into several rooms, with open-plan living and dining areas visible through the glass walls. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roof, glass walls, wooden decks, and a spacious lawn. Features include a swimming pool, open-plan interiors, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden deck, glass walls, and a glimpse of the interior layout with green lawn areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, covered patio, and open green backyard space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, outdoor dining area, and the bungalow's open layout.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, wooden deck, landscaped greenery, and large glass windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and grouped side windows
